title: Timeliness service standards and performance information: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Timeliness service standards and performance information: Environment and Climate Change Canada
Environment and Climate Change Canada publishes timeliness service standards and performance information for its services, including services for regulated parties to obtain regulatory authorization such as a permit or licence to engage in a regulated activity.
- Service standards for high volume regulatory authorizations
- Service standards, environmental grants and contributions
- Meteorological service standards Hydrometric data and information service standards Marine program weather service standards
- Hydrometric data and information service standards
- Marine program weather service standards
- Service standards and performance: permits for Scott Islands Protected Marine Area Regulations
- Service standards and performance targets for protected species trade
